message:
test(patterns): lazy initialization, thread safety, and eager/lazy parity

Pattern engine improvements and test coverage:
- Tests for lazy init deferring compilation until first detect() call
- Thread-safe concurrent initialization verification
- Lazy vs eager initialization produce identical detection results
- with_packs() eager compilation test
- is_initialized() stability after multiple detect calls
- New benchmark for pattern engine lazy initialization overhead
- lib.rs and setup.rs: module registration for new pool and undo modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
